//: Autopilot plugin settings — copy relevant sections to your Claude Code settings.json

autopilot.//costTracker: Set to false to disable token cost tracking (privacy opt-out)
autopilot.//protectedBranches: Regex alternation of branch names to protect (anchored with ^...$)

//opt-in-hooks: Copy individual hook entries below into your settings.json hooks section to enable them

PreToolUse.//: config-protection: blocks edits to linter/formatter config files
mcp-health (pre): exponential backoff for unhealthy MCP servers

PostToolUse.//: accumulator: collects edited JS/TS paths for batch-format
test-runner: auto-runs sibling tests on edit (requires vitest or jest)
design-quality: warns on generic template UI patterns

PostToolUseFailure.//: mcp-health (failure): marks MCP server unhealthy on infra errors

Stop.//: check-console: warns about console.log in modified files
batch-format: runs Prettier + tsc on all edited JS/TS files (requires accumulator)
